body:
## Summary
- Wire the shared purchase in-flight guard into the focused Remove Ads purchase runtime validator.
- Add component-level checks for RemoveAdsPlacementCta and PremiumBanner buy/restore routing.
- Raise the focused runtime case count from 15 to 21 so drift fixtures fail for the intended reasons.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-remove-ads-purchase-runtime-parity.test.js tests/v1-1-pro-iap.test.js --test-name-pattern "Remove Ads|PremiumBanner|RemoveAdsPlacementCta|ProPaywall|in-flight|purchaseActionInFlightRef|buy|restore|late"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content -- --focus-remove-ads-purchase-runtime-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `node --check scripts/validate-content.js`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `npm run test:ownership`
title: test: enforce shared purchase in-flight guards
